DATASHEET FOR CDU-3 CRUDE HEATER FUEL OIL GUN REPLACEMENT (131-F-101) > ALSO REFER TO NEW FUEL OIL AND GAS CASES MENTIONED AT THE END. 0
text:
BURNER DATASHEET C238-131-80-45-DS-73
Rev. No. 0
New Notes for Burner Oil gun replacement (EIL Job No. C238 of 2026): .

breadcrumb: DATASHEET FOR CDU-3 CRUDE HEATER FUEL OIL GUN REPLACEMENT (131-F-101) > ALSO REFER TO NEW FUEL OIL AND GAS CASES MENTIONED AT THE END. 0 > Clause 1 This datasheet is preparaed primarily intended to increase capacity of the existing burner oil guns by 10% i.e. to
text:
1. This datasheet is preparaed primarily intended to increase capacity of the existing burner oil guns by 10% i.e. to
maximum heat liberation of 3.916 MMKCal/hr.

breadcrumb: DATASHEET FOR CDU-3 CRUDE HEATER FUEL OIL GUN REPLACEMENT (131-F-101) > ALSO REFER TO NEW FUEL OIL AND GAS CASES MENTIONED AT THE END. 0 > Clause 2 The oil gun of the existing burners shall be replaced with an 10% higher capacity oil gun.
text:
2. The oil gun of the existing burners shall be replaced with an 10% higher capacity oil gun.
Fuels shall be same as existing, with new fuels corresponding to current operating scenario added as below:

breadcrumb: DATASHEET FOR CDU-3 CRUDE HEATER FUEL OIL GUN REPLACEMENT (131-F-101) > ALSO REFER TO NEW FUEL OIL AND GAS CASES MENTIONED AT THE END. 0 > Clause 3 OEM/ Oil gun supplier shall review the firebox sketch and guarantee that there shall be no flame impingement
text:
3. OEM/ Oil gun supplier shall review the firebox sketch and guarantee that there shall be no flame impingement
on the radiant tubes at maximum heat liberation.

breadcrumb: DATASHEET FOR CDU-3 CRUDE HEATER FUEL OIL GUN REPLACEMENT (131-F-101) > ALSO REFER TO NEW FUEL OIL AND GAS CASES MENTIONED AT THE END. 0 > Clause 4 Revised sketch of Radiant Box may be referred from the drawing attached.
text: 4. Revised sketch of Radiant Box may be referred from the drawing attached.
